source: Indiana Academic Standards, Kindergarten (Indiana Department of Education).

standards.title: Count by ones and tens
standards.description: Count to at least 100 by ones and tens, and count on by one from any given number.

standards.title: Write whole numbers 0–20
standards.description: Write whole numbers from 0 to 20 and recognize number words from zero to ten.

standards.title: One-to-one correspondence
standards.description: Use one-to-one correspondence when counting objects to determine how many.

standards.title: Compare quantities of two groups
standards.description: Determine whether the number of objects in one group is greater than, less than, or equal to the number of objects in another group, up to ten objects.

standards.title: Addition and subtraction within 10
standards.description: Use objects, drawings, etc., to model and add/subtract within 10. Solve real-world problems involving addition and subtraction within 10.

standards.title: Decompose numbers up to 10
standards.description: Decompose numbers less than or equal to 10 in more than one way (e.g., 5 = 2 + 3 and 5 = 4 + 1).

standards.title: Identify and describe shapes
standards.description: Identify, describe, compare, and contrast plane and solid shapes (squares, circles, triangles, rectangles, hexagons, cubes, cones, cylinders, and spheres).

standards.title: Ask and answer questions about a story
standards.description: With prompting and support, ask and answer questions about main topics and key details in a story.

standards.title: Retell a familiar story
standards.description: With prompting and support, retell familiar stories, poems, and nursery rhymes, including key details.

standards.title: Identify characters, settings, and major events
standards.description: With prompting and support, identify characters, settings, and major events in a story.

standards.title: Print concepts
standards.description: Demonstrate understanding of the organization and basic features of print, including letters, words, spacing, and sentences.

standards.title: Phonological awareness
standards.description: Demonstrate understanding of spoken words, syllables, and sounds (phonemes).

standards.title: Write opinion pieces
standards.description: With prompting and support, use a combination of drawing, dictating, and writing to compose opinion pieces about a topic or book.

standards.title: Participate in conversations
standards.description: Participate in collaborative conversations about kindergarten-appropriate topics and texts with peers and adults.
